title: Candy Rain
description: Spritz on the sweet-as-can-be fragrance of Candy Rain with this limited edition perfume of creamy tonka and cocoa absolute, with mouth-watering buchu oil.
ingredients: Dipteryx Odorata Seed Extract (Tonka Seed Extract)
Prunus Amygdalus Amara Kernel Oil (Almond Essential Oil)

images.alt: A clear glass square bottle of Candy Rain Perfume containing amber-colored liquid and a black spray top, is centered on a light grey background. The label is black with white, handwritten-style text and a small green "LUSH CLUB" sticker.

A clear glass bottle of Candy Rain Perfume with amber liquid stands on a reflective surface against an orange and pink gradient background. It is flanked by almonds, a dark raisin, and several pieces of creamy white cocoa butter.
Six Lush Club fragrances (Body Spray in Snowcake, VIMT-NO, 25:43; Perfume in Big Blue, Candy Rain, Black Pearl) are shown floating diagonally against a vibrant green and yellow background.
